changes.reason: New high-value symptom cluster for battery health deterioration, service prompts, and battery verification failures; distinct from existing battery-drain-after-update and charging-paused articles.

canonicalReview.notes: Full-corpus matching covered title, summary, symptoms, aliases, devices, platforms, errorMessages, officialTerms, communityTerms, and existing canonical articles. The matched articles cover post-update drain, temperature/80% charging protection, and charging/port faults; none covers battery-health interpretation, unknown/unverified replacement batteries, or service/safety escalation.
